title: App Store & Google Play Sentiment Analyzer Input

appId.title: App ID
appId.description: Google Play ID (e.g., com.whatsapp) or Apple App Store ID (e.g., 310633997). Note: If using App Store, you can also pass the full URL.

platform.title: Store Platform
platform.description: Select the platform to scrape reviews from.

maxReviews.title: Max Reviews
maxReviews.description: Maximum number of reviews to extract.
